translations.authErrorConflictMessage: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in with your password.
translations.authErrorUnknownMessage: An unexpected error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
translations.signUpSuccessMessage: Registration successful! We've sent a verification link to your email — click it to activate your account.
translations.emailNotVerifiedMessage: Your email is not verified yet.
translations.authErrorEmailInUse: A user with this email already exists
translations.resendVerificationThrottled: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute before trying again.
translations.resendVerificationSent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.
translations.authErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
translations.forgotPasswordSentMessage: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link has been sent.
translations.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
translations.resetPasswordExpiredMessage: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
translations.resetPasswordInvalidMessage: This reset link is invalid or has already been used.
translations.resetPasswordSuccessMessage: Password updated! Please sign in with your new password.
translations.verifyEmailExpiredMessage: Your verification link has expired. Enter your email below to receive a new one.
translations.verifyEmailResentMessage: A new link has been sent — check your inbox.
translations.verifyEmailInvalidMessage: This verification link is invalid or has already been used. Please register again.
translations.confirm.defaultMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
translations.confirm.unsavedChanges: Are you sure you want to clear this form? All unsaved changes will be lost.
translations.lockOverlayTitle: Enter your decision to unlock the square
translations.lockOverlayBody: Frame it as a yes/no question — that's what keeps the four quadrants in tension.
translations.safetyBlocked: This tool isn't designed to help with this type of decision. If you need support, please reach out to someone you trust or a qualified professional.
translations.quadrantEmpty: No arguments yet — open to add some.
translations.suggestAiLoggedOutTooltip: Log in to unlock AI suggestions and get 3–5 automated arguments for your decision.
translations.suggestAiQuotaExhaustedTooltip: You've used all your free AI suggestions for today.
translations.list.title: Descartes Square
translations.list.subtitle: Every square you've weighed — drafts in progress and decisions you've concluded.
translations.list.emptyDrafts: No drafts — every square here is concluded.
translations.list.emptySolutions: No solutions yet — finish a draft to see it here.
translations.emptyState.title: No decisions yet
translations.emptyState.subtitle: Create your first Descartes Square to start analyzing decisions clearly and confidently.
translations.balanceExplanationAct: On paper, the case for acting is heavier. Trust it — but read each card to make sure nothing's {$START_TAG_STRONG}under-weighted{$CLOSE_TAG_STRONG}.
translations.balanceExplanationStay: The case for staying is heavier. Before you close the book, revisit quadrant {$START_TAG_STRONG}04{$CLOSE_TAG_STRONG} — the cost of {$START_EMPHASISED_TEXT}not{$CLOSE_EMPHASISED_TEXT} acting is easy to under-count.
translations.balanceExplanationEven: Both sides carry similar weight. The decision likely rests on {$START_TAG_STRONG}one or two specific arguments{$CLOSE_TAG_STRONG} — read each card and ask which feels heaviest.
translations.balanceHeadlineEmpty: Add a few arguments to see {$START_EMPHASISED_TEXT}the shape of your thinking{$CLOSE_EMPHASISED_TEXT}.
translations.balanceExplanationEmpty: Open each quadrant and capture what you know. Once you've weighed a few angles, the pattern will start to show.
translations.synthesisCta: Ask AI to summarize the pattern
translations.synthesisDisclaimer: This is a mirror, not an answer. The decision is yours.
translations.reviewSubtitle: A verdict written by your own thinking. Read it. Then write yours.
translations.conclusionPlaceholder: Based on everything above — what will you do, and why?
translations.argLengthInvalid: Each argument must be 3–255 characters. Fix or remove the short ones before concluding.
translations.q1Subtitle: Upsides you gain when you commit to this decision.
translations.q2Subtitle: Upsides you preserve by not acting on this decision.
translations.q3Subtitle: Costs, losses, or trade-offs that come with acting.
translations.q4Subtitle: What you give up or miss out on by not acting.
translations.q1ReviewHelper: What will happen if you do it?
translations.q2ReviewHelper: What will happen if you don't?
translations.q3ReviewHelper: What won't happen if you do it?
translations.q4ReviewHelper: What won't happen if you don't?
translations.unclearTitle: Please provide a clearer decision title before requesting suggestions.
translations.aiQuotaExhausted: You've used all your free AI suggestions for today.
translations.aiOverloaded: AI service is currently overloaded. Please try again later.
translations.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again later
translations.synthesisLeanAct: The case for acting is heavier
translations.synthesisLeanStay: The case for staying is heavier
translations.synthesisLeanEven: Both sides are close in weight
translations.synthesisDetailWith: You've invested most detail in the {$topLabel} — notably: "{$topArgs}".
translations.synthesisDetailWithout: You've invested most detail in the {$topLabel}.
translations.synthesisTail: If that detail feels right, it's a signal. If you haven't filled the opposite quadrant in equal depth, do that before deciding.
translations.home.heroSubtitle: Stuck on a big decision? Answer four questions and see the whole picture — not just the part you keep circling.
translations.home.previewCaption: Four angles. One honest view of your choice.
translations.home.hiwIntro: 'Should I ..?' is where most people get stuck. Four specific questions move you past it — weighing the upside and the cost of both acting and staying put.
translations.home.hiwStep1Desc: e.g. "Should I move to another city?"
translations.home.hiwStep3Desc: The answer surfaces on its own, with AI suggestions if you want them.
translations.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
translations.question1: What will happen if it happens?
translations.question2: What will happen if it doesn't happen?
translations.question3: What won't happen if it happens?
translations.question4: What won't happen if it doesn't happen?
